steps.title: Identify the subject and determine its number
steps.content: The subject is “the country's name”—a singular noun phrase (one country, one name). The verb that follows must be singular.

steps.title: Choose the matching verb form
steps.content: Only is is a singular verb form. The other three options (are, have been, are being) are all plural forms that violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice D — D is correct.
